utterance:
{
  "utterance": "We're building a social platform that turns your daily struggles into viral memes, bringing humor and empathy to mental health conversations. Watch as your life becomes internet gold!",
  "title": "Meme Therapy",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "Meme Therapy uniquely combines social impact with humor, addressing mental health through relatable and humorous content that resonates with a wide audience.",
  "your_role": "presenter"
}

{
  "utterance": "In the face of global misinformation, we will build a system that uses AI to detect and counteract fake news, ensuring the truth prevails. This is not just a tool—it's a weapon for democracy.",
  "title": "TruthGuardian",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "TruthGuardian leverages AI to combat fake news, ensuring accurate information reaches the public, thereby preserving democratic integrity and social cohesion.",
  "your_role": "PM / Visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "Imagine a platform that uses AI to connect people with local volunteer opportunities, making it easy for anyone to make a difference in their community. In just 36 hours, we'll build a prototype that shows how this platform can measurably increase community engagement.",
  "title": "CommunityLink AI",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "CommunityLink AI uniquely combines AI matchmaking with local volunteer opportunities, providing a personalized and effective way for individuals to engage in meaningful community service, thus creating tangible positive change.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "We're excited to introduce 'MoodMatch', a platform that uses AI to connect individuals based on their emotional states, promoting empathy and understanding. It’s all about finding your emotional match and building meaningful connections.",
  "title": "MoodMatch",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "MoodMatch leverages AI to foster emotional connection and empathy, addressing the social issue of loneliness and lack of genuine human interaction in today's digital age.",
  "your_role": "Presenter/Marketer"
}
